case_title: SHAW, SIDNEY vs. BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CORP. DBA CALIF. MEAT CO.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAW, SIDNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CORP. DBA CALIF. MEAT CO. $1,128.09 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,208.09
